Off Calendar Sep-11-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT PEERLESS INDUSTRIES, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Appearances: Jennifer Alesio, Esq. of Brayton Purcell LLC, (415) 898-1555, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Margaretha M. Smit, Esq. of Burnham Brown (510) 444-6800, appearing for Defendant and Moving party. The tentative ruling is not being contested. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for summary judgment denied, failure to shift the burden of proof. Plaintiff testified that he worked with defendant's boiler and defendant does not present any evidence that the boiler did not have asbestos. Motion for Summary adjudication denied because notice of motion is for summary judgment only. CRC 3.1350(b). Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
